titleStmt.title: SII 29.47: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 47. (A.R. No. B. 578 of 1961-62.) KURAḌI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the wall of a house near the temple known as Nelaguḍi.

The record is broken and badly damaged. It records a grant of land by the mahājanas of agrahāra Rūḍi for the worship and offerings to the god Pallavēśvara. Ayyaṇavāḍi, Bēvinahāḷa and Kisukāḍu are mentioned here.

It is dated in Tribhuvanamalladēva year 3 Āngīrasa, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 4. Monday. The information given in the record is wrong, for the year 3 do not suit with the cyclic year Āngīrasa while keeping in view of the rule of Tribhuvanamalladēva viz., Vīkramāditya VI.

Here either the regnal year or the cyclic year is wrong. Regnal year 3 is Śaka 1000 and the cyclic year Kāḷāyukta. The given tithi corresponds with 1078 A.D., July 16, Monday. Probably this may be the intended date of the record. While the tithi in the cyclic year Āngīrasa (Śaka 1014 corresponds with 1092 A.D., July 11, Sunday).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The top and bottom portions of the record are broken and lost. Hence many lines of the end are lost.
div.p:
va nābhi (diṁ) ruhagarbba
. nataripu bhūpa
liṁgata pada paṁkaja pravarāḷige vikra
mattamikeyiṁ . negaḷdayyaṇavāḍi nāḷkāḷaṁ kritayenesedarū
sale sarvvanamasya vāgiralu . svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ
śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatri
vikrama cakravartti tribhuvanamalladēva variṣada 3 neya Āṁ
gīrasa saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śu 4 sōmavāradaṁdu svasti
yama niyamādhyayana svādhyāyadhya yanaddhāraṇa maunānuṣṭāna sa
mādhiśīla saṁpanna rāṣṭāṁga nāgni hōtra dvijagurudēva
pūjātatpararuṁ śrī mārttaṁḍōjvaḷa kīrttiyutaru sakalasāstrā
viśāradaruṁ Anēka yajñāvabhratāvagāhana pavitrīkrita śarīrigaḷu sakala
(su)matigaḷ vēdānta samaya samuddha
(raṇarū) sarasvatī labdhavaraprasādaru vidvajjana hṛdayānaṁda
kyaru Ubhaya mīmāṁsāsura tāraka śaṭutarkka(ru)
kara ravu śrī matsarvvanamasyadagrahāraṁ rūḍhiya sē
kīḷvāku śrīpallavēśvara dēvargge pūjegaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ
chatra pavitrakkaṁ Ā dēvara Aṁga bhōga raṁgabhōgakkaṁ
kavāgi holegeṟeya keḻagaṇa madhyakadalliṁ balliṁba
mattaru 18 mattaṁ bēvinahāḷa dāriyiṁ baḍa
kisukāḍu yoḷagaṇa madhyakadalli kisukāḍu
matta(vā) madhyakadiṁ baḍagaṇa maṭha
na kōlalu Ā 6 mattaru
śrī pallavēśvara dēvara kraya
yyaṁ dēvara śipādada
Digital edition of SII 29.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
